title: Taller Kelp
description: Makes the tops of kelp extend above the water’s surface. Works with any resource pack.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Taller Kelp** is a small resource pack that makes the top of kelp taller, to extend above the water’s surface similar to how it floats above the top of water in real life. Works with any resource pack.
